description: Composition Black long bermudas made of 100% polyester, with elasticated waistband that has a drawstring on the inside, mesh lining, two insert pockets on the sides, contoured white stripe panels on the side seams, embroidered brand name on the left leg and drawstring and doggle on the leg hems Fitting Comfort Wash care Wash dark colours separately below 30 degrees Do not soak or bleach Do not tumble dry Dry in shade Cool iron Do not iron on print/trims/logo Do not dry clean Made of polyester fabric, these adidas bermudas are ideal for all your fitness, Sports training and competition needs. While the soft and broad elastic waistband sits snugly, the drawstrings on the inside allow you to create a customized Fit. The fabric stays dry through an active day and the mesh lining makes it more breathable. Pair it with sports t-shirts and performance shoes for an extended training session. Model statistics The model wears trousers, length of 41.5" Height-6.1", Waist-31" adidas men Cfc Pes Black tracksuits
